_comment: Skill Graph rebuild Phase 3 (2026-07-23) — canonical C2 curriculum, the final level. Sourced from the standard CEFR progression — C2 is framed as mastery/refinement of C1 structures (near-native precision, full register command, stylistic mastery) rather than new grammar rules, matching the real CEFR C2 descriptor ('can express him/herself spontaneously, very fluently and precisely, differentiating finer shades of meaning'). Cross-links back to real c1.json/b2.json keys. Consumed by POST /api/admin/skill-graph/nodes/import.

nodes.title: Stylistic fronting in literary/rhetorical prose
nodes.description: Using fronting deliberately for literary or rhetorical effect, not just emphasis.
nodes.descriptionForAi: Cross-level: mastery refinement of C1's fronting for rhetorical effect.

nodes.title: Archaic and literary grammatical structures
nodes.description: Recognizing and occasionally using older/literary structures for stylistic effect.

nodes.title: Full range of inversion patterns
nodes.description: Commanding every inversion pattern from formal writing to spoken rhetoric.

nodes.title: Mastery of ellipsis across registers
nodes.description: Using ellipsis naturally whether the context is formal or casual.

nodes.title: Nuanced modal combinations
nodes.description: Combining modals precisely to express very fine shades of certainty/obligation.

nodes.title: Complex nominalization
nodes.description: Turning verbs/clauses into dense noun phrases typical of expert academic style.

nodes.title: Subtle aspectual distinctions
nodes.description: Choosing precisely between very close tense/aspect options for subtle meaning differences.

nodes.title: Rhetorical questions and hypophora
nodes.description: Asking and answering your own rhetorical question for persuasive effect.

nodes.title: Mastery of discourse markers across registers
nodes.description: Selecting exactly the right discourse marker for any formality level.

nodes.title: Full command of the register continuum
nodes.description: Moving fluidly across the entire formal-to-informal spectrum at will.

nodes.title: The subtlest hedging and boosting devices
nodes.description: Using the finest-grained hedges/boosters available in the language.

nodes.title: Complex embedded/nested clauses
nodes.description: Producing and parsing deeply nested clause structures without losing clarity.

nodes.title: Native-like ambiguity resolution
nodes.description: Resolving/exploiting genuine grammatical ambiguity the way a native speaker would.

nodes.title: Mastery of reported and free indirect speech
nodes.description: Blending narration and reported thought seamlessly, as in literary prose.

nodes.title: Precision with rare connectors
nodes.description: Using very infrequent formal connectors with total accuracy.

nodes.title: Stylistic repetition and parallelism
nodes.description: Using deliberate repetition and parallel structure for rhetorical power.

nodes.title: Mastery of passive and agentless constructions
nodes.description: Choosing agentless/passive structures precisely for tone and focus.

nodes.title: Idiomatic grammar patterns
nodes.description: Using grammatical patterns that are idiomatic in themselves, beyond fixed phrases.

nodes.title: Full intensifier and downtoner range
nodes.description: Commanding the complete range of intensifying/softening modifiers.

nodes.title: Mastery of quantifying precision
nodes.description: Choosing the exact quantifying expression to match a precise real-world proportion.

nodes.title: Syntactic flexibility for stylistic effect
nodes.description: Rearranging sentence structure deliberately for rhythm, emphasis, or style.

nodes.title: Mastery of a register-spanning lexicon
nodes.description: Commanding vocabulary across the full formal-to-slang spectrum.

nodes.title: Rare and literary vocabulary
nodes.description: Recognizing and appropriately using less common literary vocabulary.

nodes.title: Full idiomatic command
nodes.description: Using idioms as naturally and appropriately as a native speaker.

nodes.title: Precise connotation discrimination
nodes.description: Distinguishing extremely close near-synonyms by their exact connotation.

nodes.title: Specialized terminology across multiple domains
nodes.description: Moving fluently between the technical vocabulary of several distinct fields.

nodes.title: Vocabulary of wit and wordplay
nodes.description: The specific vocabulary and structures used to construct puns and clever wordplay.

nodes.title: Cultural and historical references
nodes.description: Recognizing and using common cultural/historical allusions appropriately.

nodes.title: Mastery of the advanced academic lexicon
nodes.description: Full command of the vocabulary used across academic disciplines.

nodes.title: Mastery of the philosophical/abstract lexicon
nodes.description: Full command of vocabulary for the most abstract philosophical discussion.

nodes.title: Mastery of legal and bureaucratic language
nodes.description: Full comprehension and controlled production of legal/bureaucratic prose.

nodes.title: Mastery of the scientific lexicon
nodes.description: Full command of vocabulary across scientific sub-disciplines.

nodes.title: Mastery of diplomatic lexicon
nodes.description: Full command of the most carefully calibrated diplomatic language.

nodes.title: Mastery of the emotional/psychological lexicon
nodes.description: Full command of vocabulary for the finest emotional/psychological distinctions.

nodes.title: Mastery of the economic/financial lexicon
nodes.description: Full command of vocabulary across economics and finance.

nodes.title: Mastery of media and rhetorical lexicon
nodes.description: Full command of vocabulary for analyzing media and rhetoric critically.

nodes.title: Mastery of corporate lexicon
nodes.description: Full command of corporate/managerial vocabulary, used with deliberate precision.

nodes.title: Mastery of environmental policy lexicon
nodes.description: Full command of vocabulary for the most technical environmental policy debate.

nodes.title: Full collocational mastery
nodes.description: Producing collocations across every register with total native-like naturalness.

nodes.title: Awareness of archaic and highly formal lexicon
nodes.description: Recognizing older/highly formal vocabulary in literary and ceremonial contexts.

nodes.title: Mastery of psychological/behavioral lexicon
nodes.description: Full command of the most nuanced behavioral-science vocabulary.

nodes.title: Mastery of dense specialist texts
nodes.description: Reading any specialist text, however dense, with full comprehension.

nodes.title: Appreciating literary style and authorial voice
nodes.description: Recognizing and appreciating a distinct authorial voice and style.

nodes.title: Understanding the most deeply implicit meaning
nodes.description: Grasping meaning that is only very indirectly suggested.

nodes.title: Critiquing methodology in research texts
nodes.description: Evaluating the soundness of a research text's methodology.

nodes.title: Reading legal texts with full comprehension
nodes.description: Reading dense legal prose with complete, expert-level comprehension.

nodes.title: Appreciating satire, parody, and wit
nodes.description: Fully appreciating layered satirical or parodic writing.

nodes.title: Synthesizing conflicting expert sources
nodes.description: Reconciling and evaluating multiple sources that directly disagree.

nodes.title: Evaluating source credibility at expert level
nodes.description: Making an expert-level judgment about a source's credibility and rigor.

nodes.title: Appreciating stylistic mastery in prose
nodes.description: Recognizing masterful prose style as distinct from merely correct writing.

nodes.title: Reading fluently across all genres
nodes.description: Moving between any genre or text type with equal ease.

nodes.title: Understanding any native speaker without difficulty
nodes.description: Following any native speaker regardless of speed, accent, or topic.

nodes.title: Understanding highly specialized academic discourse
nodes.description: Following expert-level academic discussion in any discipline.

nodes.title: Perceiving the finest shades of spoken meaning
nodes.description: Catching the subtlest possible differences in spoken meaning.

nodes.title: Understanding discourse from any professional field
nodes.description: Following specialized spoken discourse from an unfamiliar professional field.

nodes.title: Appreciating verbal wit in real time
nodes.description: Catching and enjoying spoken wit and wordplay as it happens.

nodes.title: Understanding all accents and dialects
nodes.description: Following speech in essentially any English accent or dialect.

nodes.title: Evaluating spoken arguments at expert level
nodes.description: Judging the soundness of a spoken argument the way a domain expert would.

nodes.title: Detecting persuasive manipulation in speech
nodes.description: Recognizing when persuasion tips into manipulation.

nodes.title: Following overlapping multi-party speech
nodes.description: Tracking several speakers talking over each other without losing the thread.

nodes.title: Synthesizing complex spoken information at speed
nodes.description: Processing and combining complex spoken input in real time.

nodes.title: Writing indistinguishable from a native expert
nodes.description: Producing writing that reads as native-authored in any genre.

nodes.title: Writing a polished academic paper
nodes.description: Producing a publication-quality academic paper.

nodes.title: Writing with full stylistic command
nodes.description: Deploying the complete range of stylistic devices deliberately and effectively.

nodes.title: Writing literary prose
nodes.description: Writing original literary-style prose with voice and stylistic intent.

nodes.title: Writing a sophisticated critical review
nodes.description: Writing an expert-level critical review with full command of the genre.

nodes.title: Writing at a senior executive level
nodes.description: Writing with the polish and authority expected at the most senior professional level.

nodes.title: Writing with full register control
nodes.description: Controlling register precisely across an entire long document.

nodes.title: Writing a comprehensive literature review
nodes.description: Writing a full, well-structured literature review synthesizing many sources.

nodes.title: Writing persuasively at the highest level
nodes.description: Producing writing that persuades an expert or skeptical audience.

nodes.title: Mastering cohesion across long documents
nodes.description: Keeping a very long document cohesive and easy to follow throughout.

nodes.title: Speaking with full native-like command
nodes.description: Speaking with the range, precision, and naturalness of a native speaker.

nodes.title: Presenting at the highest professional level
nodes.description: Delivering a presentation at the standard expected of a top professional speaker.

nodes.title: Debating at expert level
nodes.description: Holding your own in a debate against domain experts.

nodes.title: Deploying wit and humor masterfully
nodes.description: Using humor with perfect timing and judgment in any spoken context.

nodes.title: Negotiating at the highest diplomatic level
nodes.description: Negotiating with the tact and precision required at the diplomatic level.

nodes.title: Discussing the most abstract ideas with ease
nodes.description: Reasoning fluently about any abstract topic without strain.

nodes.title: Mediating high-stakes disputes
nodes.description: Mediating a dispute where the outcome genuinely matters, with full composure.

nodes.title: Speaking with full diplomatic mastery
nodes.description: Handling the most sensitive spoken situations with total diplomatic control.

nodes.title: Delivering expert critique with authority
nodes.description: Critiquing expert work with the authority and precision of a peer expert.

nodes.title: Speaking extemporaneously at native precision
nodes.description: Speaking unprepared with the precision a native speaker would achieve.

nodes.title: Commanding a room as a speaker
nodes.description: Holding an audience's full attention through presence and delivery alone.

nodes.title: Adjusting seamlessly across all registers
nodes.description: Moving between any two registers in speech without a noticeable seam.

nodes.title: Prosody indistinguishable from a native speaker
nodes.description: Rhythm, stress, and intonation that reads as fully native.

nodes.title: Full command of nuanced intonation
nodes.description: Using the complete intonation system to convey the finest shades of meaning.

nodes.title: Mastery of all connected speech processes
nodes.description: Producing every connected-speech process (elision, assimilation, linking) fluently together.

nodes.title: Flawless stress in any vocabulary domain
nodes.description: Applying correct stress even to unfamiliar technical/specialist words on first encounter.

nodes.title: Eliminating first-language accent interference entirely
nodes.description: Removing essentially all first-language pronunciation interference.

nodes.title: Mastery of persuasive vocal delivery
nodes.description: Using voice, pace, and pausing masterfully to maximize persuasive impact.

nodes.title: Full prosodic register control
nodes.description: Controlling pitch, pace, and rhythm to match any register at will.

nodes.title: Effortless, native-like production
nodes.description: Producing extended speech with the apparent effortlessness of a native speaker.

nodes.title: Mastery of conversational flow
nodes.description: Managing turn-taking, topic-shifts, and pacing in conversation masterfully.

nodes.title: Imperceptible self-correction
nodes.description: Correcting errors so smoothly that listeners barely notice.

nodes.title: Sustaining discourse indefinitely
nodes.description: Maintaining fluent, accurate speech for as long as the situation demands.

nodes.title: Full command of natural filler and hesitation devices
nodes.description: Using hesitation and filler language exactly as a native speaker would, for effect.

nodes.title: Total composure under any scrutiny
nodes.description: Remaining fully composed under the most intense expert scrutiny.

nodes.title: Challenging the most senior authority
nodes.description: Disagreeing confidently and appropriately with the most senior person in the room.

nodes.title: Self-evaluating against C2 can-do statements
nodes.description: Reflecting on mastery using C2-level concrete can-do statements.

nodes.title: Full embrace of linguistic risk
nodes.description: Consistently choosing the most precise, ambitious language available.

nodes.title: Total grace under any error
nodes.description: Handling any mistake, however visible, with complete composure and grace.
